subcodes.first_line: The servant beareth witness at the commencement of this Book unto the oneness of his Lord and His singleness, Who hath ever been Alone, One, Self-Subsisting [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یشهد الخادم فی اول الکتاب بوحدانیه ربه و فردانیته لم یزل کان فردا واحدا صمدا
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @work as worship
